items.title: India Boosts U.S. LPG Imports to Record High
items.snippet: Despite higher prices, India is set to import the biggest ever volumes of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from the United States in June as it seeks to replace still-constrained supply from the Middle East. items.title: Europe’s EV Boom Accelerates as Chinese Brands Gain Ground
items.snippet: Electric vehicle sales, increasingly featuring Chinese vehicles, led an overall increase in car sales in Europe last month, with gasoline and diesel cars booking declines amid higher prices at the pump.
